name: Chocolate Fudge Pudding
recipeInstructions:
To make the dough: Mix the flour and sugar together. Rub in the butter until the mixture resembles breadcrumbs. Stir in the cocoa and baking powder, then add milk gradually to form a soft dough. Place the dough in a greased pie dish with enough space for it to expand.
To prepare the sauce: Dissolve the sugar in hot water over medium heat. Mix in the cocoa and vanilla essence. Pour this mixture evenly over the dough.
Cooking: Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 45 to 50 minutes, or until golden brown.
